title: MS Dynamics 365 Finance and Operations Developer

summary.lv: TRODO meklē pieredzējušu MS Dynamics 365 Finance & Operations izstrādātāju, kas projektēs, izveidos un uzturēs risinājumus uz Dynamics 365 F&O platformas.
summary.en: TRODO is hiring an experienced MS Dynamics 365 F&O Developer to design, build and maintain solutions on the Dynamics 365 F&O platform.
